notes: The original paper pools short-distance and medium-distance experiments; this run estimates a paper-aligned short-distance subset because only five short-distance cards are retained at this stage.
The original paper uses 5,000 Sobol draws for simulated mixed logit estimation; this run mirrors that draw method in Python.

MaaS subscription is retained as a persona field for alignment with the original utility specification, but its sample distribution is assumed because the main paper excerpt used here does not report it explicitly.
